message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
left to right direction
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

actor "User" as User
participant "<<main>>\nAdministration" as Admin
participant "<<JFrame>>\nMain Menu" as MainMenu
participant "<<dialog>>\nView Products" as ViewProducts
participant "<<DAO>>\nProductManagerdao" as ProductManagerDao
participant "<<DAO>>\nDbConnection" as DbConnection

User -> Admin: click "view products" button
Admin -> MainMenu: construct
activate MainMenu
MainMenu -> ViewProducts: construct
activate ViewProducts
ViewProducts -> ProductManagerDao: getProducts()
activate ProductManagerDao
ProductManagerDao -> DbConnection: getConnection(uri);
activate DbConnection
DbConnection --> ProductManagerDao: connection
deactivate DbConnection
ProductManagerDao -> ProductManagerDao: prepareStatement(sql)
ProductManagerDao -> ProductManagerDao: executeQuery()
ProductManagerDao -> ProductManagerDao: getters retrieve product details
ProductManagerDao -> ProductManagerDao: setters set product details
ProductManagerDao --> ViewProducts: product
deactivate ProductManagerDao
ViewProducts -> ViewProducts: setModel(displayProducts)
deactivate ViewProducts
deactivate MainMenu

User -> ViewProducts: enter a product ID in search bar
activate ViewProducts
User -> ViewProducts: user clicks 'search' button
ViewProducts -> ViewProducts: searchbyIDTxt.getText()
ViewProducts -> ProductManagerDao: searchProduct(searchID)
activate ProductManagerDao
ProductManagerDao -> DbConnection: getConnection(uri);
activate DbConnection
DbConnection --> ProductManagerDao: connection
deactivate DbConnection
ProductManagerDao -> ProductManagerDao: perpareStatement(sql)
ProductManagerDao -> ProductManagerDao: setString(1, searchProdID)
ProductManagerDao -> ProductManagerDao: executeQuery()
ProductManagerDao -> ProductManagerDao: getters retrieve product details
ProductManagerDao -> ProductManagerDao: setters set product details
ProductManagerDao --> ViewProducts: product searched for (p)
deactivate ProductManagerDao
ViewProducts -> ViewProducts: updateItems(returnedProduct)
deactivate ViewProducts

User <- Admin: waiting for further user action
@enduml
```
